description: Case style: Stainless steel, circular case with branding at the backDial style: Black dial with orange markings, a raised steel colour detail on the dial top, orange and white hands, branding near the 12 hour mark, date display near the 3 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Black leather strap with stitch detail and an adjustable tang closure with loops to hold it in placeWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: One year against manufacturing defects
